title: T-017 — API: Allergen profile CRUD (POST/DELETE /api/technical/items/:code/allergens)
prompt:
# T-017 — API: Allergen profile CRUD (POST/DELETE /api/technical/items/:code/allergens)

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §10.1, §10.3, §10.8
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Allergen profile create/update/delete endpoints with override reason validation.

PUT path identifies row by composite (org_id,item_id,allergen_code). source='manual_override' forces reason field. Permission technical.allergens.edit. Action labels: allergen.create / allergen.update / allergen.override / allergen.delete in audit_log.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/api/technical/items/[item_code]/allergens/route.ts [create]
- app/api/technical/items/[item_code]/allergens/[allergen_code]/route.ts [create]
- lib/technical/allergens/service.ts [create]
- tests/api/allergen-profile.test.ts [create]

## Out of scope
- Cascade rule deploy (T-024)
- UI

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given POST with allergen_code not in reference_tables, when validated, then 422 V-TEC-40.
2. Given POST source='manual_override' without reason, when validated, then 422 V-TEC-42.
3. Given DELETE manual_override row, when audit queried, then action='allergen.delete' row exists with old payload.
4. Given user without technical.allergens.edit, when POST runs, then 403.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for V-TEC-40, V-TEC-42, audit emit, RBAC.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/api/allergen-profile.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not silently overwrite manual_override rows (preserved by cascade rule).
- Do not bypass audit_log.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
